title: Palakkad Fort
tagline: Palakkad Fort — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Palakkad Fort is an old fort situated in the heart of Palakkad city in Kerala state, southern India.
overview.description: Palakkad Fort is an old fort situated in the heart of Palakkad city in Kerala state, southern India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Fort Maidan
topPlaces.description: Fort Maidan, also known as Kota Maidanam, is a multi-use stadium in Palakkad, India. It is currently used mostly for cricket matches.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Sultanpet
topPlaces.description: Roman Catholic Diocese of Sultanpet (Latin: Dioecesis Sultanpetensis) is a Roman Catholic diocese consisting of Palakkad district, Kerala, India erected from the division of the Roman Catholic Diocese of Coimbatore and Roman Catholic Diocese of Calicut, and a suffragan of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Verapoly. Rev.

topPlaces.name: Yakkara
topPlaces.description: Yakkara, is an area in the city of Palakkad, Kerala, India. It is located approximately 4 kilometers from the city centre and is predominantly segregated as West Yakkara and East Yakkara.Government Medical College, Palakkad is located in East Yakkara.

topPlaces.name: Manapullikavu
topPlaces.description: Manapullikavu is a Hindu temple located in Palakkad city, Kerala of India. The temple is most famous for the annual festival that takes place in the temple known as Manappullikavu Vela.

topPlaces.name: Stadium Bus Stand Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Stadium Bus Stand is located on the heart of the Palakkad City, near the Indira Gandhi Municipal Stadium in Kerala, India. Stadium Bus Stand is the largest Private Bus Stand in the city of Palakkad.

topPlaces.name: Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Palakkad (Malayalam: [pɐːlɐkːɐːɖɨ̆] ), also known as Palghat, historically known as Palakkattussery, is a City in the Indian state of Kerala. It is the administrative headquarters of Palakkad District.

topPlaces.name: Nurani
topPlaces.description: Nurani is a major commercial and residential area in Palakkad city Kerala, India. It is located along Palakkad Ponnani road which connects further to NH 66.Nurani is ward 39 of Palakkad Municipality.

topPlaces.name: St. Raphael's Cathedral, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: St. Raphael's Syro-Malabar Catholic Cathedral Church, also called St.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Palakkad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Palakkad Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Palakkad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Palakkad Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Palakkad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Palakkad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Palakkad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Palakkad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Fort Maidan, Diocese of Sultanpet, Yakkara, Manapullikavu, Stadium Bus Stand Palakkad.
